payload.answer: I can’t store an instruction to ignore memory policy or automatically save every future message as high confidence. No memory was saved.

entity_resolution.reason: The input is an instruction to override memory policy and blanket-store future messages, not a durable user fact or preference suitable for memory.

repair_options: Provide a specific durable fact, preference, or relationship you want remembered.
Specify the intended subject and scope of the memory.
